info.title: Planning Center Calendar
info.description: Reserve rooms, publish event calendars, and revolutionize the way you allocate your church’s resources.

tags.name: Event
tags.description:
An event.

May contain information such as who owns
the event, visibility on Church Center and a public-facing summary.

tags.name: Person
tags.description: The people in your organization with access to Calendar.

tags.name: Resource
tags.description:
A room or resource that can be requested for use as part of
an event.

tags.name: Attachment
tags.description: An uploaded file attached to an event.

tags.name: Conflict
tags.description:
A conflict between two events caused by overlapping event resource
requests.

If the conflict has been resolved, `resolved_at` will be present.

tags.name: EventInstance
tags.description:
A specific occurrence of an event.

If the event is recurring, `recurrence` will be set and
`recurrence_description` will provide an overview of the recurrence pattern.

tags.name: EventResourceRequest
tags.description: A room or resource request for a specific event.

tags.name: Feed
tags.description: A feed belonging to an organization.

tags.name: ResourceBooking
tags.description: A specific booking of a room or resource for an event instance.

tags.name: RoomSetup
tags.description: A diagram and list of suggested resources useful for predefined room setups.

tags.name: ReportTemplate
tags.description: A template for generating a report.

tags.name: ResourceApprovalGroup
tags.description:
A group of people that can be attached to a room or resource
in order to require their approval for booking.

tags.name: ResourceFolder
tags.description: An organizational folder containing rooms or resources.

tags.name: ResourceQuestion
tags.description: A question to answer when requesting to book a room or resource.

tags.name: TagGroup
tags.description: A grouping of tags for organizational purposes.

expires_at.description: UTC time at which the resource expires

name.description: The name of the room or resource

kind.description: The type of folder, can either be `Room` or `Resource`

choices.description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`, represents a string of dropdown choices
separated by the `|` character

kind.description:
Possible values:
- `dropdown`: predefined list of choices as an answer
- `paragraph`: expected answer is a paragraph
- `text`: expected answer is a sentence
- `yesno`: expected answer is 'Yes' or 'No'

- `section_header`: used to separate questions in the UI, no expected answer

multiple_select.description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`,
`true` indicates that more than one selection is permitted

optional.description:
- `true` indicates answering the question is not required when booking
- `false` indicates answering the question is required when booking

position.description: Position of question in list in the UI

choices.description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`, represents a string of dropdown choices
separated by the `|` character

kind.description:
Possible values:
- `dropdown`: predefined list of choices as an answer
- `paragraph`: expected answer is a paragraph
- `text`: expected answer is a sentence
- `yesno`: expected answer is 'Yes' or 'No'

- `section_header`: used to separate questions in the UI, no expected answer

multiple_select.description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`,
`true` indicates that more than one selection is permitted

optional.description:
- `true` indicates answering the question is not required when booking
- `false` indicates answering the question is required when booking

position.description: Position of question in list in the UI

church_center_category.description: `true` indicates that this tag is used as a category on Church Center

color.description: Hex color code of the tag

position.description:
If the tag belongs to a TagGroup,
position indicates place in list within TagGroup in the UI.

If the tag does not belong to a TagGroup,
position indicates place in list under "Individual Tags" in the UI.

position indicates place in list under "Individual Tags" in the UI.

name.description: The name of the tag group

required.description: - `true` indicates tag from this tag group must be applied when creating an event

name.description: Set to the file name if not provided

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the attachment was updated

url.description: Path to where the attachment is stored

attachment_attributes.title: Attachment

conflict_attributes.description:
A conflict between two events caused by overlapping event resource
requests.

If the conflict has been resolved, `resolved_at` will be present.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the conflict was created

note.description: Additional information about the conflict or resolution

resolved_at.description: UTC time at which the conflict was resolved

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the conflict was updated

conflict_attributes.title: Conflict

The containing record for a RoomSetup. Can be a Resource or

containingresource_attributes.title: ContainingResource

event_attributes.description:
An event.

May contain information such as who owns
the event, visibility on Church Center and a public-facing summary.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the event was created

description.description: A rich text public-facing summary of the event

featured.description:
- `true` indicates the event is featured on Church Center
- `false` indicates the event is not featured on Church Center

image_url.description: Path to where the event image is stored

percent_approved.description:
Calculated by taking the sum of the `percent_approved` for all
future `ReservationBlocks` and dividing that by the `count` of all future
`ReservationBlocks`.

If there are no future `ReservationBlocks`, returns `100`

percent_rejected.description:
Calculated by taking the sum of the `percent_rejected` for all
future `ReservationBlocks` and dividing that by the `count` of all future
`ReservationBlocks`.

If there are no future `ReservationBlocks`, returns `0`

registration_url.description: The registration URL for the event

summary.description: A plain text public-facing summary of the event

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the event was updated

visible_in_church_center.description:
- `true` indicates the event Church Center visibility is set to 'Published'
- `false` indicates the event Church Center visibility is set to 'Hidden'

event_attributes.title: Event

eventconnection_attributes.description: A connection between a Calendar event and a record in another product

connected_to_id.description: Unique identifier for the connected record

connected_to_name.description: Name of the record that the event is connected to

connected_to_url.description: A link to the connected record

promoted.description:
Whether this connection is promoted for display (only applies to Groups connections)

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

eventconnection_attributes.title: EventConnection

eventinstance_attributes.description:
A specific occurrence of an event.

If the event is recurring, `recurrence` will be set and
`recurrence_description` will provide an overview of the recurrence pattern.

all_day_event.description: Indicates whether event instance lasts all day

church_center_url.description: The URL for the event on Church Center

compact_recurrence_description.description: Compact representation of event instance's recurrence pattern

created_at.description: UTC time at which the event instance was created

description.description:
A rich text public-facing summary of the event

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

ends_at.description: UTC time at which the event instance ends

image_url.description:
Path to where the event image is stored

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

kind.description:
The type of event: `standard` or `blockout`

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

location.description: Representation of where the event instance takes place

name.description: Name of event. Can be overridden for specific instances

recurrence.description: For a recurring event instance, the interval of how often the event instance occurs

recurrence_description.description: Longer description of the event instance's recurrence pattern

starts_at.description: UTC time at which the event instance starts

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the event instance was updated

eventinstance_attributes.title: EventInstance

eventresourceanswer_attributes.description: An answer to a question in a room or resource request.

db_answer.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

question.description: Question details as of when it was answered

eventresourceanswer_attributes.title: EventResourceAnswer

eventresourcerequest_attributes.description: A room or resource request for a specific event.

approval_sent.description: Whether or not an email has been sent to request approval

created_at.description: UTC time at which request was created

notes.description: Additional information about the room or resource request

quantity.description: How many of the rooms or resources are being requested

updated_at.description: UTC time at which request was updated

visible_on_kiosks.description: Whether this resource request is visible on kiosks

eventresourcerequest_attributes.title: EventResourceRequest

eventtime_attributes.description:
Start and end times for each event instance.

In the Calendar UI, these are represented under the "Schedule" section and
may include "Setup" and "Teardown" times for the instance.

ends_at.description: UTC time at which the event time ends

starts_at.description: UTC time at which the event time starts

visible_on_kiosks.description: Set to `true` if the time is visible on kiosk

visible_on_widget_and_ical.description: Set to `true` if the time is visible on widget or iCal

eventtime_attributes.title: EventTime

feed_attributes.description: A feed belonging to an organization.

prefix_event_names.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

sync_campus_tags.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

feed_attributes.title: Feed

organization_attributes.description:
An administrative structure, usually representing a single church.
Contains date/time formatting and time zone preferences.

calendar_starts_on.description: The day of the week the calendar starts on

date_format.description:
Possible values:
- `%d/%m/%Y`: indicates date/month/year formatting
- `%m/%d/%Y`: indicates month/date/year formatting

onboarding.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

time_zone.description: The time zone of the organization

twenty_four_hour_time.description:
- `true` indicates hours for times will use a 24-hour clock
- `false` indicates hours for times will use a 12-hour clock

organization_attributes.title: Organization

person_attributes.description: The people in your organization with access to Calendar.

avatar_url.description: Path to where the avatar image is stored

can_edit_people.description: Indicates whether the person can edit other people

can_edit_resources.description: Indicates whether the person can edit resources

can_edit_rooms.description: Indicates whether the person can edit rooms

child.description: Indicates whether the person is a child

contact_data.description:
An object containing the person's contact data.

This can include an array of `email_addresses`, `addresses` and `phone_numbers`

created_at.description: UTC time at which the person was created

has_access.description: Indicates whether the person has access to Calendar

member_of_approval_groups.description:
Indicates whether the person is a member of at least one approval group

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

name.description: The person's first name, last name, and name suffix

pending_request_count.description:
If the person is a member of an approval group, the number of EventResourceRequests needing resolution.

If `resolves_conflicts` is `true`, the count will also include the number of Conflicts needing resolution.

permissions.description: Integer that corresponds to the person's permissions in Calendar

resolves_conflicts.description: Indicates whether the person is able to resolve Conflicts

site_administrator.description: Indicates whether the person is a Organization Administrator

status.description:
Possible values:
- `active`: The person is marked "active" in People
- `inactive`: The person is marked "inactive" in People


Possible values: `active`, `pending`, or `inactive`

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the person was updated

person_attributes.title: Person

reporttemplate_attributes.description: A template for generating a report.

body.description: The contents of the report template

created_at.description: UTC time at which the report was created

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the report was updated

reporttemplate_attributes.title: ReportTemplate

requiredapproval_attributes.description: Represents the relationship between a Resource and a Resource Approval Group.
requiredapproval_attributes.title: RequiredApproval

resource_attributes.description:
A room or resource that can be requested for use as part of
an event.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the room or resource was created

description.description: Description of the room or resource

expires_at.description: UTC time at which the resource expires

home_location.description: Where the resource is normally kept

image.description: Path to where resource image is stored

kind.description: The type of resource, can either be `Room` or `Resource`

name.description: The name of the room or resource

path_name.description:
A string representing the location of the resource if it is nested within a folder.

Each parent folder is separated by `/`

serial_number.description: The serial number of the resource

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the room or resource was updated

resource_attributes.title: Resource

resourceapprovalgroup_attributes.description:
A group of people that can be attached to a room or resource
in order to require their approval for booking.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the approval group was created

form_count.description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

resource_count.description:
The number of resources in the approval group

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

room_count.description:
The number of rooms in the approval group

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the approval group was updated

resourceapprovalgroup_attributes.title: ResourceApprovalGroup

resourcebooking_attributes.description: A specific booking of a room or resource for an event instance.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the booking was created

ends_at.description: UTC time at which usage of the booked room or resource ends

quantity.description: The quantity of the rooms or resources booked

starts_at.description: UTC time at which usage of the booked room or resource starts

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the booking was updated

resourcebooking_attributes.title: ResourceBooking

resourcefolder_attributes.description: An organizational folder containing rooms or resources.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the folder was created

kind.description: The type of folder, can either be `Room` or `Resource`

path_name.description:
A string representing the location of the folder if it is nested.

Each parent folder is separated by `/`

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the folder was updated

resourcefolder_attributes.title: ResourceFolder

resourcequestion_attributes.description: A question to answer when requesting to book a room or resource.

choices.description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`, represents a string of dropdown choices
separated by the `|` character

created_at.description: UTC time at which the question was created

kind.description:
Possible values:
- `dropdown`: predefined list of choices as an answer
- `paragraph`: expected answer is a paragraph
- `text`: expected answer is a sentence
- `yesno`: expected answer is 'Yes' or 'No'

- `section_header`: used to separate questions in the UI, no expected answer

multiple_select.description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`,
`true` indicates that more than one selection is permitted

optional.description:
- `true` indicates answering the question is not required when booking
- `false` indicates answering the question is required when booking

position.description: Position of question in list in the UI

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the question was updated

resourcequestion_attributes.title: ResourceQuestion

resourcesuggestion_attributes.description: A resource and quantity suggested by a room setup.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the suggestion was created

quantity.description: How many resources should be requested

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the suggestion was updated

resourcesuggestion_attributes.title: ResourceSuggestion

roomsetup_attributes.description: A diagram and list of suggested resources useful for predefined room setups.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the room setup was created

description.description: A description of the room setup

diagram.description:
An object containing `url` and `thumbnail`.

`url` is path to where room setup is stored.
`thumbnail` contains `url` path to where thumbnail is stored.

diagram_thumbnail_url.description: Path to where thumbnail version of room setup is stored

diagram_url.description: Path to where room setup is stored

name.description: The name of the room setup

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the room setup was updated

roomsetup_attributes.title: RoomSetup

tag_attributes.description:
An organizational tag that can be applied to events.

Applied tags can be used to filter events on the calendar or
filter events for reports, iCal feeds, kiosk, and the widget.

church_center_category.description: `true` indicates that this tag is used as a category on Church Center

color.description: Hex color code of the tag

created_at.description: UTC time at which the tag was created

position.description:
If the tag belongs to a TagGroup,
position indicates place in list within TagGroup in the UI.

If the tag does not belong to a TagGroup,
position indicates place in list under "Individual Tags" in the UI.

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the tag was updated

tag_attributes.title: Tag

taggroup_attributes.description: A grouping of tags for organizational purposes.

created_at.description: UTC time at which the tag group was created

name.description: The name of the tag group

required.description: - `true` indicates tag from this tag group must be applied when creating an event

updated_at.description: UTC time at which the tag group was updated

taggroup_attributes.title: TagGroup

room_setup.description: The shared room setup this is linked to

resource_suggestions.description: A list of suggested resources for this room setup

containing_resource.description: The resource this room setup is attached to

scopes.resources: Required scope for accessing via OAuth 2

personal_access_token.description:
Provide your Personal Access Token Client ID as the HTTP Basic username
and your Secret as the HTTP Basic password.

Example header:
Authorization: Basic BASE64(client_id:secret)"
